characters.name: 林雷
characters.appearance: A young boy, 6 years old, short black hair, wearing simple linen clothes and wooden sandals, serious expression

characters.name: Trainer A
characters.appearance: Middle-aged man, muscular build, bald head, wearing a sleeveless vest and coarse cotton pants, standing firmly

characters.name: Trainer B
characters.appearance: Middle-aged man, strong physique, dark skin, wearing a brown sleeveless top and loose training pants

characters.name: Trainer C
characters.appearance: Muscular middle-aged man with a scar on his arm, wearing a gray vest and cloth trousers

scenes.narration: 乌山镇，坐落于魔兽山脉以西，清晨的阳光洒在宁静的小镇上。
scenes.visual_prompt: Wide aerial shot of a small ancient town surrounded by mountains at sunrise, golden light spreading over tiled roofs and dusty roads, misty atmosphere, fantasy style

scenes.narration: 朝阳初升，小镇居民已开始一天的劳作，孩童们也纷纷起身晨练。
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium shot of townspeople walking on dirt paths, carrying tools, children in simple clothes running toward an open field, soft morning light with long shadows

scenes.narration: 东边空地上，温热阳光透过大树洒下斑驳光点，映照着一群肃立的孩子。
scenes.visual_prompt: Low-angle wide shot of a large training ground under dappled sunlight from tall trees, hundreds of children standing in formation, silence in the air, cinematic lighting

scenes.narration: 孩子们按年龄分为三组，最小的六到八岁，神情认真而稚嫩。
scenes.visual_prompt: Close-up side view of the northern group of young children, ages 6-8, standing straight, some trembling with effort, early sun highlighting their faces

scenes.narration: 中间是九到十二岁的少年，站姿挺拔，眼神中透出坚毅。
scenes.visual_prompt: Medium tracking shot across the middle row of older kids, focused expressions, sweat on brows, wearing basic training outfits, morning breeze rustling clothes

scenes.narration: 最南边是十三到十六岁的少年，体格健壮，充满青春的力量。
scenes.visual_prompt: Low-angle wide shot of the southern team of teenagers, muscular builds, standing like soldiers, strong backlight from sunrise creating heroic silhouettes

scenes.narration: 三位壮硕教头站在前方，短背心粗布裤，气势威严。
scenes.visual_prompt: Frontal medium shot of three muscular trainers standing in a line, arms crossed, wearing sleeveless vests and cotton pants, stern expressions, sun behind them
